# substreams-websocket

> Real-time WebSocket fan-out server for Substreams `DatabaseChanges`. Decodes
> blocks from any `db_out`-style Substreams package and broadcasts them as JSON
> to connected WebSocket subscribers. URL conventions mirror Binance market
> streams: stream selectors are `<network>@<table>` (where `<table>` is the
> DatabaseChanges table emitted by the spkg's `db_out` ‚Äî e.g. `swaps`,
> `transfers`, `spl_transfers`) with `*` wildcards on either side.

## Connecting

- `wss://<host>/ws/<network>@<table>` ‚Äî single channel, raw payloads.
- `wss://<host>/ws/<a>/<b>/...` ‚Äî multi channel, payloads wrapped as `{"stream":"<id>","data":<raw>}`.
- `wss://<host>/stream?streams=<a>/<b>/...` ‚Äî query mode, always wrapped.
- Bare `/ws` returns HTTP 400; use `/ws/*@*` to subscribe to every (network, table) channel.

Clients subscribe by `<network>@<table>` where `<table>` is a DatabaseChanges table emitted by the spkg's `db_out` module (`swaps`, `transfers`, `spl_transfers`, ...).

## Block payload

```
{
  "network":     "solana-mainnet",
  "table":       "swaps",
  "block_num":   350000000,
  "block_hash":  "Gsk6...",
  "timestamp":   "2026-05-13 17:00:00",
  "module_hash": "bd388f2e...",
  "events": [
    { "input_amount": "1287000000", ... }
  ]
}
```

One payload per `(network, table)` group per block. All event field values are strings on the wire. The per-event `@table` prefix is dropped because the parent payload already carries `table` at the top level. This is a live-only feed: there is no replay log. The params `?from_timestamp=` and `?from_block=` are not supported and return HTTP 400 at upgrade ‚Äî use Substreams to backfill by block, cursor, or timestamp.

## Live commands

Send a JSON text frame on the connected socket:

```
{ "method": "SUBSCRIBE",         "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps"], "id": 1 }
{ "method": "UNSUBSCRIBE",       "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps"], "id": 2 }
{ "method": "LIST_SUBSCRIPTIONS", "id": 3 }
{ "method": "SET_FILTER",        "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps", "protocol:raydium_cpmm && user:F2MUE‚Ä¶"], "id": 4 }
{ "method": "CLEAR_FILTER",      "params": ["solana-mainnet@swaps"], "id": 5 }
{ "method": "LIST_FILTERS",      "id": 6 }
```

Replies are `{"result": null | [...] | {...}, "id": <echoed>}`. Errors are `{"error": "...", "id": <echoed>}` and do not close the socket.

## Event filters

Reduce bandwidth by dropping non-matching events server-side. The filter is an **SQE expression string** (same language as Firehose `substreams run -t`): `field:value` exact case-sensitive equality, bare `value` matches any column, combined with `||` (OR), `&&`/whitespace (AND), `!` (NOT), `( )` grouping. Pass `?filter=<url-encoded-expr>` (alias `?sqe=`) on the upgrade, or use `SET_FILTER` mid-stream ‚Äî `params[1]` is the expression **string** (it replaces the filter for that selector, so combine with `||` rather than sending multiple; read the `{"result"|"error"}` reply, and `LIST_FILTERS` to confirm). OR-across-columns now works (`tx_from:0xW || maker:0xW || taker:0xW`, or just bare `0xW`). Missing-field=miss; zero matches = block skipped. Filters apply to wildcard selectors too. `MAX_FILTER_VALUES` (default 64) caps the total number of terms in the expression, `MAX_FILTER_FIELDS` (default 16) caps distinct field names; over-cap or parse error rejects the filter. Full command and semantics reference is in `/SKILL.md`.

## Discovery

- `GET /healthz` ‚Üí `200 ok` if the server is live, `503` if draining.
- `GET /streams` ‚Üí JSON list of configured streams with `network`, `package_name`, `package_version`, `module_hash`, and `tables`. Use it to confirm a `network@table` exists before connecting.
- `GET /openapi` (also `/openapi.json`) ‚Üí OpenAPI 3.1 document covering every HTTP GET route, reflecting runtime config.
- `wss://<host>/ws/*@*` ‚Üí connect and read the `session` message for the same catalog inline.

## Client troubleshooting

- `ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'websockets'` ‚Äî install the Python `websockets` package.
- `TypeError: ... unexpected keyword argument ...` on connect ‚Äî WebSocket library kwarg renamed across versions (e.g. `extra_headers` vs `additional_headers`). Match the installed version.
- Close code `1009` (`message too big`) or silent disconnects on Solana-heavy streams ‚Äî raise the client max frame/message size to at least 32 MiB (Python: `max_size=32 * 1024 * 1024`).
- Socket opens, no payloads ‚Äî recheck the selector, confirm the table in `/streams` or `session.streams[].tables`.
- `{"type":"stream","status":"error|fatal"}` carries upstream errors ‚Äî surface `message` to the user and reconnect to resume the live stream.

## Resources

- [SKILL.md](/SKILL.md): full agent-oriented reference.
- `/`: interactive in-browser client (Scalar-style API reference + try-it panel).
